note: Ayah-by-ayah with PAUSES (0.5s and 1.5s gaps). Originally only 98:1 detected: user ran --mode stream, pauses were <2s SILENCE_RESET so buffer never reset -> growing-buffer lock on the long 98:1. DIAGNOSIS: Silero VAD segments this into 3 clean speech regions; per-segment decode matches 98:2(0.43) and 98:3(0.05) correctly (98:1 needs prefix match, long ayah under-decodes as whole). FIX: auto/stream now reset on Silero VAD speech-end (min_silence 500ms, noise-robust) instead of energy+2s counter -> each ayah isolated -> in-distribution single-ayah decode. Segmentation was the bug, not decode.
